channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Dyson’s newest floor scrubber is already on sale for 20 percent off
item.description: Dyson feels like it’s been on a tear as of late. The company recently introduced a handheld version of its iconic fan and a travel-friendly hair dryer, along with a mopping version of its ultra-thin PencilVac. And while none of them are currently discounted, you can save on the new Dyson Clean+Wash Hygiene wet cleaner, […]

item.title: Apple after Tim Cook — John Ternus will take the helm at a pivotal moment, with big shoes to fill and huge questions to answer
item.description: What challenges does Apple's incoming CEO face? And what will Apple do — and be — under John Ternus?

item.title: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate gets a price cut but loses new Call of Duty games
item.description: After Xbox CEO Asha Sharma admitted last week that "Game Pass has become too expensive for players," Microsoft is dropping the price of Xbox Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass. Starting today, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate drops from $29.99 to $22.99 a month, and PC Game Pass moves to $13.99, down from $16.49 a […]

item.title: TAG Heuer Has Dropped New Polylight-Powered F1s
item.description: The five new F1 watches recharge using sunlight and start at $1,950.

item.title: Cette « Steam Machine » espagnole grille Valve et rivalise avec la PS5 Pro
item.description: Valve fait attendre sa Steam Machine depuis six mois. Un développeur basé en Espagne a décidé de ne plus patienter, et le résultat fait mal.

item.title: The Best Casio Watches You Can Wear Anywhere
item.description: From calculators to simple daily beaters, these are my favorite Casio watches on sale today.

item.title: Former Pinterest team redesigns email with Extra — and it’s actually good
item.description: Extra, from a team of former Pinterest designers and engineers, reimagines email around your life instead of the traditional inbox.

item.title: AI Dungeon maker Latitude unveils Voyage, a platform for creating AI-powered RPGs
item.description: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.

item.title: Google now lets you have full conversations with Gemini for Home
item.description: Google announced today that it is upgrading the Gemini for Home service with a "continued conversations" feature. Continued conversation allows a user to have a natural discussion with the Gemini platform without prefacing every follow-up request with the "Hey Google" prompt. The microphone will remain active on a smart device for a few seconds after the Gemini AI assistant provides its reply. During that window, the lights on the hardware will pulse or glow, indicating that you can keep chatting normally with the chatbot without needing a wake word. Gemini should retain the context as the con...

item.title: Windows 11 : Rufus profite d’une importante mise à jour qui lui offre de nouveaux pouvoirs
item.description: Le très populaire outil de création de clés USB d’installation pour les systèmes d’exploitation profite d’une mise à jour particulièrement intéressante qui lui offre de nouveaux pouvoirs sur l’installation de Windows 11.

item.title: Ransomware negotiator pleads guilty to helping ransomware gang
item.description: A former employee of a cybersecurity firm pleaded guilty to aiding ransomware criminals to maximize their profits, with the goal of taking a cut of the ransom.

item.title: Comment transférer ses playlists Spotify vers Deezer ?
item.description: Entre augmentations régulières des prix et retard sur les technologies audio, on peut être tenté de quitter Spotify… pour Deezer par exemple. Mais si l'idée de refaire toutes vos playlists musicales vous décourage d'avance, sachez qu'il est possible de les transférer d'une application à l'autre, et que la procédure est très simple.

item.title: The next evolution of The Verge’s homepage is here
item.description: When we updated our homepage in 2022, our primary goal was simple: The Verge should be fun to read, every time you visit. With that update, we introduced the homepage StoryStream and Quick Posts, and it was built to redesign the relationship we have with you, our audience. It’s been almost four years since then, […]

item.title: Out of all Spotify's music discovery tools over 20 years, my loyalty still lies with this underrated feature — and it’s not Discover Weekly
item.description: This Spotify feature is one of the app's most underrated tools for music discovery.

item.title: New leaks reveal pricing and performance specs for DJI’s next beginner drones
item.description: DJI plans to debut two new drones later this week according to a recent teaser. But ahead of the official announcement, Italian electronics retailer Dino Galiano has shared listings for both the DJI Lito 1 and Lito X1 drones that include full tech specs and pricing, as spotted by reliable leaker Roland Quandt. The Lito […]

item.title: Score up to 40% off best-selling running & walking shoes on Amazon — Nike, Hoka, Sketchers, Brooks, and more
item.description: Just in time for spring, Amazon has a huge sale on its best-selling walking and running shoes, and I've rounded up the best deals, including up to 40% off Nike, Hoka, Sketchers, and more.

item.title: The Asus ROG Xbox Ally falls to a record-low price, but is it worth picking up while the Steam Deck suffers stock shortages?
item.description: Amazon has taken £100 off the Asus ROG Xbox Ally and dropped the handheld gaming PC to a record-low price — but here's what you should consider before hitting that buy button.

item.title: PlayStation franchit le cap de la vérification d’âge au Royaume-Uni, et en France ?
item.description: Après Xbox et Discord, c'est au tour de PlayStation de verrouiller ses fonctions sociales derrière un contrôle d'identité. Le mouvement dépasse largement le jeu vidéo.

item.title: Bond, a new social media platform, wants to use AI to help you kick your doomscrolling habit
item.description: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.

item.title: On n’est plus dans la science-fiction : il est vraiment possible d’acheter un robot humanoïde en promo aujourd’hui
item.description: Le robot humanoïde Agibot X2 Ultra interagit physiquement avec le monde réel, fait des cœurs avec les doigts, danse, marche comme un humain et... est disponible à l'achat. Il est même un poil moins onéreux que d'habitude : Joybuy l'affiche à 36 889 euros au lieu de 41 899 euros. C'est toujours ça de pris.

item.title: Samsung brings SmartThings integration to IKEA's Matter devices
item.description: Samsung is expanding the SmartThings connectivity platform to include many IKEA products. The company promises "seamless integration" with the furniture giant's Matter-over-Thread devices, which include stuff like smart lights, air quality sensors, remote controls and smart plugs. This is great news for IKEA fans who want to bark orders at a smart assistant to turn the lights off and on, as Samsung says users will be able to "effortlessly incorporate" these gadgets into daily life. The SmartThings platform allows for advanced home automation routines. Samsung Samsung says it "built enhanced in...

item.title: 'There's a whole congregation of that kind of person' — Former The Last of Us dev says Neil Druckmann told him that 'several people' alongside Ellie were immune in the world of the post-apocalyptic game
item.description: Former Naughty Dog lighting artist Gabriel Betancourt has claimed The Last of Us series creator Neil Druckmann told him that Ellie wasn't the only immune person in the game's world.

item.title: Dolby Atmos is coming to free-to-air TV at last — no internet, no fee, and no next-gen tuner, but still immersive audio
item.description: There's life in free broadcast TV yet, and you won't need ATSC 3.0 to get it

item.title: Plus patron, mais diplomate : le nouveau rôle ultra-stratégique de Tim Cook chez Apple
item.description: Tim Cook ne sera bientôt plus le patron, mais sa carrière continue chez Apple avec un poste particulièrement stratégique.

item.title: 'If AI were to take anyone's job, wouldn't it take Elon Musk's job? The richest guy on Earth?' — Take-Two CEO says AI won't get rid of jobs, but allow artists to do 'higher quality work' instead
item.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has said that artificial intelligence (AI) won't steal artists' jobs, but that it will allow them to do "higher quality work" instead of tedious tasks.

item.title: 'Stop selling or sharing my personal information': Research finds that Big Tech could be tracking you even when you've opted out
item.description: Explicit requests not to be tracked are being ignored, even in US states where such privacy matters are law.

item.title: IPVanish rolls out RAM-only server filter across all apps to make it easier to boost your privacy
item.description: IPVanish has expanded its in-app filter to all apps, helping users easily find and connect to its growing network of RAM-only servers. Here's why it matters for your privacy.

item.title: YouTube expands its AI likeness detection technology to celebrities
item.description: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection tool to celebrities, giving talent and their reps a way to find and remove deepfakes.

item.title: Certains Pixel 10 ont des problèmes de géolocalisation, le GPS est totalement instable
item.description: Certains propriétaires de Pixel 10 ont constaté de sérieux problèmes de géolocalisation : données GPS inexactes, suivi saccadé ou encore estimation de la vitesse erroné.

item.title: What AI model should you use for revenue intelligence? Von says all the big ones, and it will automate mixing and matching for you
item.description: Looking at enterprise AI adoption, VentureBeat has anecdotally observed a fairly wide divergence when it comes to specific roles: For those who build—engineers and developers—the arrival of AI has been transformative, moving through the workflow with the speed of tools like Claude Code and Cursor to automate the heavy lifting of syntax and architecture. Yet, for those who sell, the "revenue stack" has remained a fragmented collection of data silos, manual CRM entries, and anecdotal reporting. Von, a new AI platform emerging from the team behind process automation startup Rattle, aims to bridge...

item.title: Meilleur casque audio à moins de 100 euros : pour quel modèle opter en 2026 ?
item.description: Si la plupart des casques audio sans-fil sont assez coûteux, il existe tout de même de bons produits à moins de 100 euros. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs casques pas chers en 2026.

item.title: Three AI coding agents leaked secrets through a single prompt injection. One vendor's system card predicted it
item.description: A security researcher, working with colleagues at Johns Hopkins University, opened a GitHub pull request, typed a malicious instruction into the PR title, and watched Anthropic’s Claude Code Security Review action post its own API key as a comment. The same prompt injection worked on Google’s Gemini CLI Action and GitHub’s Copilot Agent (Microsoft). No external infrastructure required.Aonan Guan, the researcher who discovered the vulnerability, alongside Johns Hopkins colleagues Zhengyu Liu and Gavin Zhong, published the full technical disclosure last week, calling it “Comment and Control.” Gi...

item.title: La WWDC 2026 d’Apple devrait être unique en son genre, voici pourquoi
item.description: La keynote de la WWDC 2026 devrait symboliser la passation de pouvoir entre Tim Cook et John Ternus.

item.title: Dune is the new worldwide music platform aiming to fix Spotify's artist income problem — and the band you love? Probably loves it
item.description: This new music platform is like Spotify and Kickstarter rolled into one — and one of my all-time favorite bands is launching music exclusively on it.

item.title: Apple : Donald Trump rend hommage à Tim Cook… et finit par l’insulter
item.description: Pour rendre hommage à Tim Cook, le président américain Donald Trump s'est fendu d'un message sur son réseau social. Ça partait d'une bonne intention, jusqu'à ce qu'il l'insulte.

item.title: Pénurie de kérosène en vue ? Le prix des billets d’avion risque d’exploser pour les vacances d’été
item.description: Le patron de l'Agence internationale de l'énergie parle de « plus grande crise énergétique jamais connue ». L'Europe dispose de six semaines de stock de kérosène, et le cessez-le-feu avec l'Iran vacille.

item.title: The 'immersive' DJI Avata 2 just hit a new record-low price — this is your cue to get into FPV drones
item.description: The DJI Avata 2 is the easy way to start your FPV drone journey - particularly with this record-low deal at Amazon.

item.title: IKEA’s range of affordable smart home devices just got a handy upgrade — and it’s a big win for Samsung phone and TV users
item.description: Samsung just made it easier for you to integrate your IKEA smart home devices with SmartThings.

item.title: Score the Ecovacs Deebot X11 robot vacuum and mop for its lowest price yet
item.description: As of April, 21, Ecovacs Deebot X11 robot vacuum and mop for its lowest price yet.

item.title: Game Pass en avril 2026 : Aphelion, Kiln, Final Fantasy… voici la deuxième vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft vient de dévoiler la deuxième vague du Game Pass du mois d'avril avec la sortie attendue d'Aphelion, le nouveau jeu de Don't Nod.

item.title: The extinction or the adaptation: how AI will impact SaaS market
item.description: SaaS used to rely on enterprise subscriptions. Now, AI threatens this business model.

item.title: The Soundcore Space 2 headphones prove why Soundcore is the budget brand to beat
item.description: Mashable's headphones reviewer spent two weeks trying out the new Soundcore Space 2 headphones. At $129.99, they're some of the best budget headphones she's tried.

item.title: How to watch Half Man online for free: Stream Richard Gadd's Baby Reindeer follow-up from anywhere, release date
item.description: Richard Gadd's much-anticipated gritty follow-up to Baby Reindeer has arrived – here's how to watch Half Man online from anywhere, including FREE streams.

item.title: OLED, 120 Hz, Ultra 7, 32 Go RAM : ce laptop Lenovo très bien équipé est aussi 47 % moins cher (mais pas pour tout le monde)
item.description: Fin, léger et doté d'une configuration plus que solide, le Lenovo Yoga Slim 7 est actuellement disponible à un très bon prix. La Fnac l'affiche en effet à 999,99 euros au lieu de 1 899,99 euros, mais seulement pour ses adhérents.
